commit.message:
Add combined requirements.txt (fix tqdm/datasets conflict, guard GPU block)

- tqdm: >=4.66.3 instead of ==4.66.1 (datasets==3.6.0 requires >=4.66.3)
- GPU block: comment out torch/torchvision pins; torch is pulled transitively
  at a platform-valid version, and torch 2.4.0 has no macOS x86_64 wheel.
  Makes `pip install -r requirements.txt` succeed cross-platform (incl. Intel Mac).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
